description: Key rotation verification scenarios. Tests the key trust model when domains rotate Ed25519 keys.

cases.description: Content signed with the current active key verifies successfully
Content signed with a retired key that is still within the trust TTL verifies successfully
cases.note: Verification checks current key first, then falls back to previous_keys

cases.description: Content signed with a key not in current or previous_keys is untrusted
cases.note: Key is valid Ed25519 but not associated with this domain

cases.description: When domain is unreachable, Synapse witness provides second-class trust (not cached)
cases.note: Second-class trust is NOT cached to disk — must be re-verified each time
